name: open-academic-paper-machine
description: Open Academic Paper Machine — Autonomous academic paper production system with idea evaluation gate. NEW in v6.3: Phase 0 (Idea Evaluation) with 3 specialist agents (Idea Critic, Research Strategist, Brainstormer), 7 evaluation dimensions, 8 research strategy principles (RS1-RS8), and the conclusion-first test — based on Carlini (2026) and research-companion. Uses MCP academic-search tools (Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, CrossRef, arXiv) for literature search, snowballing, and export. PaperBanana for AI figure generation based on Zhu et al. (2026, arXiv:2601.23265) — direct Python API (primary, reliable) with MCP fallback. 16 skill engines (idea, literature, theory, method, writing, qualitative, figure, verification, LaTeX, review + screening, peer review, positioning, submission, presentation, co-author) with fill-in-the-blank templates. 24 curated scientific skills from K-Dense AI (scientific-writing, statistical-analysis, visualization, hypothesis-generation, venue-templates, and more). 17 slash commands including /evaluate-idea for standalone idea stress-testing, /write-paper for the full 9-phase pipeline, /analyze-interviews for qualitative data analysis, /review-paper for simulated peer review, /screen-papers for SLR screening, /prepare-submission for venue-specific submission, /analyze-positioning, /analyze-writing, /monitor-literature, and /generate-slides.

args: if [ -n "$GOOGLE_API_KEY" ]; then :; elif [ -f "$HOME/.paperbanana.env" ]; then set -a; . "$HOME/.paperbanana.env"; set +a; elif [ -f "$PWD/.env" ]; then set -a; . "$PWD/.env"; set +a; fi; exec paperbanana-mcp
